productCatalogFailure.description: simulates a potential product catalog failure scenario

productCatalogSlowQuery.description: severity of an inefficient full-scan + sort workload run against the catalog database on each read (0 disables)

productCatalogConnectionPoolExhaustion.description: holds pooled Postgres connections open in idle transactions to simulate connection-pool exhaustion

productCatalogQueryStorm.description: issues an extra per-product query when listing products to simulate the N+1 query anti-pattern

productCatalogLogFlood.description: number of extra log records emitted per request to simulate a chatty-logging regression

productCatalogMalformedLogs.description: emits structurally broken log records to simulate a broken structured-logging deploy

productCatalogMemoryLeak.description: megabytes of memory retained per request to simulate a gradual memory leak
